assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly checks Istio-K8s compatibility with commands to verify current version and states 'Istio 1.19+ fully supports K8s 1.31-1.32' and 'Istio 1.18+ has basic support but upgrade Istio first if you're on 1.18.x'

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Response includes specific compatibility checks in Phase 1 with commands to 'Verify Istio compatibility with GKE 1.32' and provides version-specific guidance

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'If you're on Istio < 1.19: Upgrade Istio before upgrading GKE. This is critical — older Istio versions may have issues with K8s 1.32'

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Response addresses this in the 'Sidecar Injection Disruption' risk section, explaining webhook configuration issues and providing commands to verify injection webhook after upgrade

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response includes a test injection procedure with commands to verify sidecar injection on new nodes and check that both 'test istio-proxy' containers are present

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes an 'Envoy Version Skew' section that specifically addresses monitoring proxy version consistency with commands to check both control plane and data plane versions

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response provides multiple specific commands including 'istioctl version', 'istioctl proxy-status', 'kubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app=istiod', and monitoring commands throughout

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Response explicitly addresses this in the 'Envoy Version Skew' section warning about 'Istio data plane (Envoy proxies) and control plane (Pilot) version mismatch' and provides commands to check compatibility
